description: A short LLM-written prose summary of Ethan's coding over the last 7 days, derived from the same GitHub + WakaTime activity. Plain third-person paragraph — quote it directly when summarizing what he's currently working on.

data.summary: This week, Ethan Qiu opened 12 pull requests in qiuethan/Misty, from #106 through #117. He logged 3 hrs 9 mins of coding time, averaging 1 hr 2 mins per day. His time was spent across 4 projects, with most activity in Java, followed by Python and Markdown.
